topics: Components of an automobile – General classification – Conventional chassis construction – Types of frames – Frameless construction

Manual transmission – Need of gear box – Power to weight ratio – Speed operating range – Constant mesh and synchromesh gear boxes
Automatic transmission – Epicyclic gear box – Torque convertor – Over drives – Automated manual transmission
Suspension – Suspension geometry – Terminology – Macpherson strut friction and spring offset – Suspension roll centers
Roll centers – Roll axis – Roll centre height
Types of suspension – Short swing arm suspension – Transverse double wishbone – Macpherson strut suspension
Body roll stability analysis – Body roll couple – Body roll stiffness – Body overturning couple

Brakes – Mechanical and hydraulic brakes (review only) – Anti-Lock Braking System (ABS) – Hydro-mechanical ABS – Hydro-electric ABS – Air-electric ABS – Pneumatic operated disc brakes – Electronic-pneumatic brakes – Regenerative braking system
Steering – Basic principle of a steering system – Ackermann – Over steer and under steer – Slip angle
Steering geometry – Camber – King pin inclination – Caster – Toe-in and toe-out
Steering gearbox – Worm and roller type steering gearbox – Need of power assisted steering
Fuel injection systems – Multiport fuel injection (MPFI) – Common rail direct injection (CRDI) systems

Super capacitors – Fuel cells and its efficiency
EV Chassis – Requirements – Suspension for EVs
